{{Quote|If you need more resources, Jesi here can sell them to you.|[[Raine Taske]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:StAoCC" />}}
'''Jesi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he resided on board [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]], where he worked as a resource vendor. Hence, he often provided resources for [[Raine Taske]], an [[Artisan/Legends|artisan]] and trader living on the station.<ref name="SWG:StAoCC" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a spacer who was himself an artisan arrived on Tansarii Point Station and started working with Raine Taske. Jesi sold him various resources to craft different kinds of items such as clothing,<ref name="SWG:StAoCC" /> food,<ref name="SWG:StAoCF">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Trader|Sharing the Art of Crafting: Food|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref> and survey tools.<ref name="SWG:StAoCST">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Trader|Sharing the Art of Crafting: Surveying Tools|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Jesi appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:StAoCC" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Jesi was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:StAoCC" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
